checks.detail: game_manager.gd:673-677 creates MerlinStore via call_deferred('add_child', store)

merlin_game_controller.gd:112 store=get_node_or_null('/root/MerlinStore'). Code correct. Race window exists but benign (MerlinGame loads many frames after autoloads). Already tracked in E2E-MERLINSTORE-DEFERRED-RACE-CHECK (P33).
SFXManager line 28, I18nRegistry line 27, PixelTransition line 30 all in project.godot autoloads

integration_test.additional_finding: All 19 autoload script files verified present on disk (PASS 19/19)

findings.title: Grammar constraint is a no-op for OllamaBackend
findings.detail: ollama_backend.gd:418-428 set_grammar() is explicitly a no-op ('Ollama ne supporte pas GBNF grammar'). merlin_ai.gd:1186-1194 calls target_llm.set_grammar() for GM-routed calls (when params.grammar is set), but this is silently ignored. SmartEffects calculation and all structured JSON generation run WITHOUT grammar constraints. Game Master JSON output is entirely unconstrained — higher risk of malformed effects.

findings.title: RAG context hard-truncated to 200 chars despite 800-token budget
findings.detail: merlin_llm_adapter.gd:307: `user_prompt += ' Contexte: %s.' % rag_ctx.substr(0, 200)`. RAGManager.get_prioritized_context() returns up to BRAIN_BUDGETS['narrator']=800 tokens (3200 chars). Only 200 chars (~50 tokens) reach the LLM prompt. Narrative continuity and cross-run memory severely degraded. Additionally, the call at line 305 passes no brain_role ('narrator'), falling back to 400-token default instead of 800.

findings.title: context_builder missing named time_of_day and season strings
findings.detail: context_builder.gd:build_full_context() includes heure_normalisee (float 0.0-1.0) but no human-readable time_of_day (matin/midi/soir/nuit) or season (printemps/ete/automne/hiver). Director q-20260412-002: 'L'ambiance doit changer en fonction de saison et heure de journée'. The LLM cannot interpolate the float to narrative-quality descriptions. VFX-DAYNIGHT-RUNSTATE-EXPOSE (P26) only handles the run_state exposure side, not the context_builder.

findings.title: generate_card() returns empty card with no static fallback
findings.detail: merlin_llm_adapter.gd:274: on all failure paths returns {ok:false, card:{}, error:...}. The caller (merlin_card_system.gd) receives an empty card dict — if it doesn't handle this gracefully, the player sees a blank/broken card. The adapter itself has NARRATIVE_FALLBACKS for text but no fallback card construction for the full card struct.

findings.title: No JSON/text quality tracking in adapter
findings.detail: studio_learnings.json stores llm_quality.json_success_rate but MerlinLlmAdapter has no success/failure counters. No way to detect LLM quality degradation across a session. Impossible to track when repair strategies kick in.

findings.title: get_prioritized_context called without brain_role
findings.detail: merlin_llm_adapter.gd:305 calls rag_mgr.get_prioritized_context(context) without brain_role='narrator'. RAGManager.get_prioritized_context signature is (game_state, brain_role='') — with no role, budget defaults to 400 tokens. Narrator budget is 800 tokens. Missed opportunity for richer context.

findings.title: No player-facing feedback on Ollama warmup failure
findings.detail: If start_warmup() fails (Ollama not running, model not loaded), is_ready stays false. MerlinLlmAdapter.is_llm_ready() returns false — caller gets empty error response. No in-game UI notification. Player experiences silent LLM failure with no indication.

passing_checks: Ollama connection: check_available() + check_model_available() properly implemented with timeout
Think-tag stripping: _strip_thinking_tags() correctly handles unclosed <think> tags
Model cascade: QUAD->TRIPLE->DUAL->SINGLE+->SINGLE->NANO fallback chain implemented
Brain routing: narrator for creative, gamemaster for grammar-constrained calls
Scenario prompts: 21 templates loaded from data/ai/config/scenario_prompts.json
Response cache: 200-entry LRU cache prevents redundant LLM calls

summary: TEST[SPEC-8]: T-E2E-INTEGRATION-REGRESSION ALL 6 CHK PASS. All 19 autoload files exist on disk. MerlinStore deferred race window benign (already tracked P33). LLM PIPELINE AUDIT: 14 checks (7 PASS, 2 FAIL_HIGH, 2 FAIL_MEDIUM, 1 FAIL_LOW, 2 WARN). FAIL_HIGH(2): (1) OllamaBackend.set_grammar() no-op => GM JSON unconstrained (LLM-GRAMMAR-NOOP P14). (2) RAG context truncated to 200 chars despite 800-token narrator budget (LLM-RAG-CONTEXT-ROLE P19). FAIL_MEDIUM(2): context_builder missing named time_of_day/season (LLM-CONTEXT-TIME-NAMED P26-linked), generate_card() no static fallback (LLM-GENERATE-CARD-FALLBACK P22-level). 6 new LLM tasks added (P14-P72).
